text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 30 

BENE_RACE_CD 

LABEL: Race of Beneficiary 

DESCRIPTION: The race of the beneficiary. 

SHORT NAME: RACE 

LONG NAME: BENE_RACE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: 1 = White 
2 = Black 
3 = Other 
4 = Asian 
5 = Hispanic 
6 = North American Native 
0 = Unknown 

COMMENT: This field comes from the race code that is present on the first claim record included in the stay. 

^ Back
